name: S3 — decision + close in one push both survive (routing rule 1; dogfood DF-1b)

seed.subject: cent-allocation
seed.body: How do we allocate leftover indivisible cents on uneven splits? Blocks settle-up.

push.subject: cent-allocation
push.body: Decided: largest-remainder allocation; the payer absorbs the residual cent. Deterministic and testable.

push.subject: cent-allocation
push.body: Closed: resolved by the largest-remainder decision.

push_summary: resolve cent allocation: decision + lifecycle close in one push
script_note: fake mode deliberately scripts the DF-1b MISCLASSIFICATION (decision refines question) — the scenario asserts routing rule 1 downgrades it and both records survive even when the classifier errs
